description: Clone a KubeVirt VirtualMachine by creating a VirtualMachineClone resource. This creates a copy of the source VM with a new name using the KubeVirt Clone API

name.description: The name of the source virtual machine to clone

namespace.description: The namespace of the source virtual machine

targetName.description: The name for the new cloned virtual machine

name: vm_clone
title: Virtual Machine: Clone

description: Create a VirtualMachine in the cluster with the specified configuration, automatically resolving instance types, preferences, and container disk images. VM will be created in Halted state by default; use autostart parameter to start it immediately.

autostart.description: Optional flag to automatically start the VM after creation (sets runStrategy to Always instead of Halted). Defaults to false.

instancetype.description: Optional instance type name for the VM (e.g., 'u1.small', 'u1.medium', 'u1.large')

name.description: The name of the virtual machine

namespace.description: The namespace for the virtual machine

networks.description: Optional secondary network interfaces to attach to the VM. Each item specifies a Multus NetworkAttachmentDefinition to attach. Accepts either simple strings (NetworkAttachmentDefinition names) or objects with 'name' (interface name in VM) and 'networkName' (NetworkAttachmentDefinition name) properties. Each network creates a bridge interface on the VM.

oneOf.description: NetworkAttachmentDefinition name (used as both interface name and network name)
Network configuration with custom interface name

name.description: Interface name in the VM (optional, defaults to networkName)

performance.description: Optional performance family hint for the VM instance type (e.g., 'u1' for general-purpose, 'o1' for overcommitted, 'c1' for compute-optimized, 'm1' for memory-optimized). Defaults to 'u1' (general-purpose) if not specified.

preference.description: Optional preference name for the VM

size.description: Optional workload size hint for the VM (e.g., 'small', 'medium', 'large', 'xlarge'). Used to auto-select an appropriate instance type if not explicitly specified.

storage.description: Optional storage size for the VM's root disk when using DataSources (e.g., '30Gi', '50Gi', '100Gi'). Defaults to 30Gi. Ignored when using container disks.

workload.description: The workload for the VM. Accepts OS names (e.g., 'fedora' (default), 'ubuntu', 'centos', 'centos-stream', 'debian', 'rhel', 'opensuse', 'opensuse-tumbleweed', 'opensuse-leap') or full container disk image URLs

name: vm_create
title: Virtual Machine: Create

description: Manage VirtualMachine lifecycle: start, stop, restart, pause, or unpause a VM

action.description: The lifecycle action to perform: 'start' (changes runStrategy to Always), 'stop' (changes runStrategy to Halted), 'restart' (stops then starts the VM), 'pause' (suspends the running VMI in-place), or 'unpause' (resumes a paused VMI)

name.description: The name of the virtual machine

namespace.description: The namespace of the virtual machine

name: vm_lifecycle
title: Virtual Machine: Lifecycle
